claimText: Mhadei Wildlife Sanctuary is located in North Goa along the Western Ghats, bordering the states of Karnataka and Maharashtra.
evidenceExcerpt: Located in North Goa along the Western Ghats, bordering Karnataka and Maharashtra.
examUse: Statement-based question on geographical location and bordering states of protected areas.

claimText: The Mahadei (Mondovi) River flows through the Mhadei Wildlife Sanctuary.
evidenceExcerpt: Mahadei (Mondovi) River flows through the sanctuary.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching protected areas with rivers flowing through them.

claimText: Mhadei Wildlife Sanctuary features moist deciduous and evergreen vegetation, and is home to the rare Ashoka tree with saffron-colored flowers.
evidenceExcerpt: Features moist deciduous and evergreen vegetation, including the rare Ashoka tree with saffron-colored flowers.
examUse: Statement-based question on forest types and specific rare flora of protected areas.
